hero.title: Learn Value Investing by Doing
hero.subtitle: Analyze real NASDAQ stocks with professional-grade tools. Understand fundamentals, estimate fair value, and build your investing framework, step by step.

valueInvesting.sectionSubtitle: The strategy used by Warren Buffett, Benjamin Graham, and the most successful long-term investors.
valueInvesting.pillar1Description: Value investors look for stocks trading below what the business is actually worth. This 'margin of safety' protects against mistakes and market downturns.
valueInvesting.pillar2Description: Instead of following trends, value investors study financial statements: revenue, cash flow, debt levels, and profitability. Numbers don't lie.
valueInvesting.pillar3Description: Value investing isn't day trading. It's about finding great businesses at fair prices and holding them while they compound wealth over years.

learningPath.sectionTitle: How This App Helps You Learn
learningPath.sectionSubtitle: Follow a structured path from stock discovery to investment decision.
learningPath.step1Description: Use the screener to find stocks scored on fundamentals, technicals, and valuation. Filter by sector, signal, and category.
learningPath.step2Description: Dive into each company's financials: revenue trends, cash flow, balance sheet strength. Every metric has an interactive glossary to teach you what it means.
learningPath.step3Description: See multiple valuation models (DCF, Graham, EPV) combined into a fair value estimate. Learn how to tell if a stock is cheap or expensive.
learningPath.step4Description: Combine fundamental analysis, valuation, technicals, and management quality into a complete picture. The guided tour walks you through every section.

features.sectionSubtitle: Every feature is designed to teach you value investing concepts as you use them.
features.glossaryDescription: Click any financial term to see a clear definition and real-world example.
features.tourDescription: A step-by-step walkthrough that teaches you how to read each analysis section.
features.fundamentalDescription: 30+ weighted criteria evaluate profitability, growth, debt, and cash flow quality.
features.fairValueDescription: Multiple valuation models combined to estimate what a stock is truly worth.
features.technicalDescription: RSI, moving averages, MACD, and momentum help you time your entries.
features.managementDescription: Piotroski F-Score, insider activity, and capital allocation reveal leadership quality.

cta.title: Ready to Start Analyzing?
cta.subtitle: Pick a stock from the screener and begin your value investing journey.
